overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist walking through a historic Middle Eastern city at blue hour. The character ascends a stone ramp lined with palm trees and historic buildings, with warm lantern light contrasting against the deep blue twilight sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone ramp, approaching the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes sitting by the staircase
pedestrian walking up the ramp ahead

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with external staircase and wooden lattice windows
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked on the side
wide cobblestone ramp ascending between buildings
tall date palm trees lining the upper ramp
burning fire pit providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a historic stone city at blue hour, with the character walking up a wide cobblestone ramp. A stone building with an external staircase dominates the left side while a hay cart sits on the right. Warm firelight from a brazier contrasts with the cool twilight sky as the character approaches palm trees at the top of the incline.

events.description: white detection highlight appears around three pedestrians, indicating game mechanic for identifying targets or enemies
character reaches the crest of the ramp and continues onto the elevated bridge section

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd while ascending the final section of the ramp

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow robe walking down the ramp
pedestrian in black robes with white trim walking ahead

entered.detail: low stone wall lining the edge of the ramp
simple wooden stall with dark canopy
elevated wooden platform structure with roof

segments.scene_description: The character continues up the enclosed ramp section, passing stone railings and a wooden market stall. A game detection highlight briefly appears around several NPCs. The crowd density increases with pedestrians in flowing robes passing by, while palm trees frame the walkway ahead and a wooden watchtower becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view from elevated position

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to focus on the sky and palm tree canopy
a bird flies across the deep blue sky overhead

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera up to observe the sky and surroundings while continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: bird flying across the sky from left to right

entered.detail: deep blue twilight sky with visible stars beginning to appear

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a stunning view of the deep blue twilight sky, with palm tree fronds silhouetted against the fading light. A bird flies across the frame as the wooden watchtower remains visible to the right. The perspective emphasizes the verticality of the palm trees and the transition from day to night.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with market activity

events.description: camera tilts back down from sky view to street level
entering the lower market district with illuminated doorways

agents.ego_description: descending into the lower street area, approaching the market district

entered.detail: multi-story stone houses with wooden shutters and balconies
wooden market structures with goods displayed
warmly lit entrance to a building with glowing interior
tall tower visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level as the character descends into a bustling lower district. Stone residential buildings line both sides with warmly lit doorways and market stalls visible ahead. The atmosphere is lively with moderate pedestrian activity, and a distant minaret is visible against the remaining twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic stone city, ascending a ramp toward a twilight vista before descending into a bustling lower district. It begins with the character walking up a wide cobblestone incline past a stone building and a hay cart, where warm brazier fire contrasts with the deep blue of the blue hour. As the character continues upward, the path becomes more enclosed by stone railings and market stalls, passing through an increasing crowd of pedestrians in flowing robes toward a wooden watchtower. The camera then tilts upward to capture the silhouette of palm fronds and a flying bird against the fading twilight sky, emphasizing the city's verticality. Finally, the perspective returns to street level as the character descends into a lively residential area lined with warmly lit doorways and market stalls, with a distant minaret visible against the horizon.
